svg.text: Sunshine Town Home-Centered Layout Proposal V4
Adjusted review version: Home is the center. School is upper-left toward the Sun; Story/Culture connects School and Home; Shop is upper-right; Animal Park is lower-right.
All daily loops start from home. Taxi stays as doorway /
Child walks toward the Sun to school; school remains a
Story/Culture connects school return and home, not a
Daily shopping branch is visible from home but not
Animal landmarks form a coherent park / zoo corner.
Umbrella and X-mark Box form an optional beach/coast
Proposal only: not applied to runtime JSON. Use this for layout review before changing map coordinates or production art contracts.
